diagrams.title: One-Dimensional Array Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how elements are stored contiguously in memory with index addresses
diagrams.purpose: Understand contiguous memory allocation and address calculation

diagrams.title: Two-Dimensional Array Row-Major Storage
diagrams.description: Visualizes how a 2D array appears in memory as a single linear sequence
elements: Index mapping: arr[1][2] = element at position 5
diagrams.purpose: Understand row-major order and index to memory position mapping

diagrams.title: Array and Pointer Relationship
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how array name points to first element and pointer arithmetic
elements: Shows pointer arithmetic for array access
diagrams.purpose: Visualize equivalence between subscript and pointer notation
